signatureChanges.describe: List Test becomes Array Test (handled by core List->Array)
signatureChanges.concat: List Test becomes Array Test (handled by core List->Array)
signatureChanges.reportDistribution: List ( String, a -> Bool ) becomes Array { label : String, fn : a -> Bool } (tuple-to-record, needs compat)
signatureChanges.expectDistribution: List ( ExpectedDistribution, String, a -> Bool ) becomes Array { expectedDistribution : ExpectedDistribution, label : String, fn : a -> Bool } (triple-to-record, needs compat)

signatureChanges.all: List (subject -> Expectation) becomes Array (subject -> Expectation) (handled by core List->Array)
signatureChanges.AbsoluteOrRelative: AbsoluteOrRelative Float Float becomes AbsoluteOrRelative { absolute : Float, relative : Float } (tuple-to-record in type constructor)

signatureChanges.pair: returns { first : a, second : b } instead of ( a, b )
signatureChanges.triple: returns { first : a, second : b, third : c } instead of ( a, b, c )
signatureChanges.frequency: List ( Float, Fuzzer a ) becomes Array { weight : Float, fuzzer : Fuzzer a } (needs compat)
signatureChanges.frequencyValues: List ( Float, a ) becomes Array { weight : Float, value : a } (needs compat)
signatureChanges.oneOf: List (Fuzzer a) becomes Array (Fuzzer a) (handled by core List->Array)
signatureChanges.oneOfValues: List a becomes Array a (handled by core List->Array)
signatureChanges.lazy: (() -> Fuzzer a) becomes ({} -> Fuzzer a) (unit type change)
signatureChanges.sequence: List -> List becomes Array -> Array (handled by core)
signatureChanges.traverse: List -> List becomes Array -> Array (handled by core)
signatureChanges.examples: returns Array instead of List (handled by core)

removed.filterMap: not exposed in gren-lang/test; use Fuzz.filter instead

signatureChanges.Runner: record fields change: run uses {} not (), labels uses Array not List
